parameters.name: geocode_place
parameters.description: Convert a place name, address, or city into latitude/longitude coordinates. Parameters: place (name/address, required). Returns human-readable location + coordinates.

value.place: ={{ $fromAI('place', 'Place name, address, or city (e.g. Baldeneysee Essen, Brandenburger Tor Berlin, Marienplatz Munich)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: find_nearby
parameters.description: Find points of interest near a location by category. Parameters: category (required, one of: restaurant, cafe, bar, pub, fast_food, biergarten, hotel, guest_house, hostel, alpine_hut, supermarket, bakery, pharmacy, attraction, museum, gallery, information, parking, fuel, charging_station, atm, toilets, drinking_water, shelter, peak, picnic_site, waterfall, spring, camp_site), lat+lon (decimal coordinates) OR place (name/address to auto-geocode), radius (meters, optional, default 1000), limit (max results, optional, default 15).

value.category: ={{ $fromAI('category', 'POI category (restaurant, cafe, hotel, drinking_water, alpine_hut, peak, camp_site, etc.)', 'string') }}
value.lat: ={{ $fromAI('lat', 'Latitude as decimal (e.g. 48.1371). Either lat+lon OR place required.', 'string') }}
value.lon: ={{ $fromAI('lon', 'Longitude as decimal (e.g. 11.5754). Either lat+lon OR place required.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: reverse_geocode
parameters.description: Convert latitude/longitude coordinates into a human-readable address (street, district, city). Use this after find_nearby when POIs come back with only coordinates and no addr:street tag (e.g. drinking water fountains, park benches, hiking trail markers). Parameters: lat (required), lon (required). Respects Nominatim 1 req/sec rate limit, so call sparingly (e.g. only for top 2-3 results of interest).

parameters.name: search_custom
parameters.description: Run a custom Overpass QL query (for advanced queries beyond the presets). Parameters: query (Overpass QL string, required). Example: '[out:json][timeout:25];node[historic=castle](around:5000,48.1,11.5);out;'
